STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] UP: Energy Sector Momentum Offsets Tech Weakness as Index Maintains Bullish Structure
tldr_points: Energy sector strength (CVX, APA) driving index higher amid oil price surge
Tech weakness contained (ORCL, FISV) without broader market contagion
MA20 support zone intact; RSI in neutral territory suggesting room for extension
STOCKS.excerpt: Energy-led rally offsets tech caution; technicals support upside continuation
STOCKS.comment: Energy-led rally offsets tech weakness; MA20 support zone provides tactical entry
